events.note: Created .worktrees/serial-refactors, copied plan artifacts, built fresh worktree code map. git status contains expected untracked plan/map artifacts.
Wrote .warden/research/2026-05-08-serial-refactors/01-cli-demo.md; selected grouped section modules plus catalog/shared/shell extraction.

Split src/cli/demo/App.tsx into catalog, shared, shell, demo-kit, and grouped section modules. Verified with bun run test -- src/cli/__tests__/integration/inline-flag-order.integration.test.ts, bun run typecheck, git diff --check, bun run test after installing playground/ws in the worktree, and refreshed code map.

Wrote .warden/research/2026-05-08-serial-refactors/02-panes.md. Decision: add characterization tests, marker-based normalized child metadata, and generalize existing compound Panes renderer beyond the two-child special case without a full post-layout compositor rewrite.
Adding characterization tests for unsupported nested Panes shapes before changing renderer internals.

Implemented marker-based normalized Panes metadata and generalized compound row/column renderer beyond the exact two-child nested special case. Added failing-then-passing tests for nested-column siblings, adjacent nested columns, and nested-row siblings. Verified targeted suite, typecheck, full Vitest, diff check, and refreshed code map.
Researching existing flattenVisible implementations and affected Tree-related tests before implementation.

Wrote .warden/research/2026-05-08-serial-refactors/03-tree-flatten.md. Decision: add generic internal flattenVisibleTree utility and adapters that keep Tree, useTreeBehavior, TreeTable, and DirectoryTree public shapes stable.
Adding tree-flatten utility tests before creating the shared utility and migrating call sites.

Created src/utils/tree-flatten.ts and src/__tests__/tree-flatten.test.ts, then migrated Tree, useTreeBehavior, TreeTable.flatten, and DirectoryTree through stable adapters. Verified focused tree/table suite, typecheck, full Vitest, diff check, and refreshed code map.
Researching duplicated isNavigable/navigation helper logic and affected tests before implementation.
Wrote .warden/research/2026-05-08-serial-refactors/04-navigation.md. Decision: add isNavigableItem to utils/navigation and replace four repeated local predicates without changing public APIs.
Extracting isNavigableItem into utils/navigation and replacing local isNavigable predicates.

Added isNavigableItem type guard to utils/navigation and migrated Menu, OptionList, SearchList, and useMenuBehavior. Verified focused tests, typecheck, full Vitest, diff check, and refreshed code map.
Researching duplicated text editing operations across input hooks/components before implementation.
Wrote .warden/research/2026-05-08-serial-refactors/05-text-editing.md. Decision: extract only pure linear and multiline text-edit helpers; leave event-handler orchestration in the hooks.
Adding pure text-edit helper tests, then extracting linear and multiline helpers into src/hooks/headless/text-edit/.

Extracted pure linear and multiline text-edit helpers into src/hooks/headless/text-edit, added direct helper tests, and migrated TextInput/TextArea/ChatInput without changing hook APIs. Verified text-focused suite, typecheck, full Vitest, diff check, and refreshed code map.
Researching layout engine split boundaries, exports, and tests before implementation.

Wrote .warden/research/2026-05-08-serial-refactors/06-layout-engine.md. Decision: keep engine.ts as facade; extract public layout types and box-model helpers first, leaving mutually coupled grid/flex/measurement logic in place.
Extracting layout public types and box-model helpers while preserving engine.ts imports/exports.

Split layout public types into src/layout/types.ts and box-model helpers into src/layout/box-model.ts while keeping engine.ts as facade. Verified layout-focused suite, API surface via bun run test:api, typecheck, full Vitest, diff check, and refreshed code map.
Researching renderer.ts paint-helper boundaries and affected tests before implementation.

Split layout public types into src/layout/types.ts and box-model helpers into src/layout/box-model.ts while keeping engine.ts as facade. Verified layout-focused suite, API surface via bun run test:api, typecheck, full Vitest, diff check, and refreshed unstale code map.
Researching renderer paint module boundaries with code-map and source/test evidence before implementation.

Wrote 07-renderer.md. Selected a conservative first renderer split: clip helpers, text ingestion/wrapping helpers, and reuse of layout resolveScrollbarGutter; deferred stateful background/border/scrollbar extractions.
Implementing the conservative renderer helper extraction chosen in 07-renderer.md.

Extracted renderer clip helpers to src/reconciler/paint/clip.ts and text helpers to src/reconciler/paint/text.ts; reused layout resolveScrollbarGutter; added renderer-paint-helpers tests. Verified focused renderer suite, bun run test:api, typecheck, full Vitest, diff check, and refreshed unstale code map.
Researching WebRenderer static page builder extraction before implementation.
Wrote 08-web-renderer.md. Selected single-responsibility extraction of the static HTML/page builder to src/core/web-renderer-page.ts; deferred WebSocket protocol and frame diffing splits.
Implementing static WebRenderer page-builder extraction selected in 08-web-renderer.md.

Extracted the static WebRenderer browser page into src/core/web-renderer-page.ts and wired handleHttp to buildWebRendererPage without changing WebRenderer options/API. Added page-builder tests. Verified focused suite, typecheck, full Vitest, diff check, and refreshed unstale code map.
Researching shared chart helper extraction surface before implementation.
Wrote 09-charts.md. Selected pure chart-core helpers for braille metrics and compact number formatting; deferred component-specific range, legend, binning, color, and interaction refactors.
Implementing chart-core braille metrics and compact formatting helper extraction selected in 09-charts.md.

Added src/components/data/chart-core/format.ts for braille chart metrics and compact chart formatting; wired LineChart/AreaChart/ScatterPlot metrics and BarChart/Histogram/Heatmap formatting; added chart-core tests. Verified focused chart suite, typecheck, full Vitest, diff check, and refreshed unstale code map.
Running final verification gate for serial refactor branch.

Final gate complete: local research artifacts were generated but remain ignored; bun run typecheck passed, bun run test passed (94 files, 964 tests), bun run test:api passed (9 tests), git diff --check passed, and code-map status stale=false.
